metadata.description: Azure region for the app resource
Deployment environment: dev | staging | prod
ACA managed environment resource ID
Shim user-assigned managed identity resource ID (provisioned in Phase 1 managed-identity.bicep)
Full image reference, e.g. racdevacr001.azurecr.io/rac-shim:v1.0
ACR login server, e.g. racdevacr001.azurecr.io
Name of the Key Vault secret holding the shim database DSN (full DSN with password embedded)
Name of the Key Vault secret holding the cookie HMAC secret
Platform Key Vault URI, e.g. https://kv-rac-xxxx-dev.vault.azure.net/
Parent DNS domain, e.g. rac.moffitt.org
OIDC issuer URI for reviewer token validation
Cookie domain for rac_session HttpOnly cookie (typically .{parentDomain})
ACA internal suffix, e.g. internal.xxxxxxxx.eastus.azurecontainerapps.io
Institution display name shown in branded error pages
Optional institution brand logo URL shown in interstitial and error pages
Enable Prometheus/OpenTelemetry metrics endpoint
OTLP exporter endpoint (leave empty to disable OTLP export; local Prometheus still works)
Resource tags

containers.name: shim
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'RAC_SHIM_DATABASE_DSN', 'secretRef', parameters('databaseDsnSecretName')), createObject('name', 'RAC_SHIM_COOKIE_HMAC_SECRET', 'secretRef', parameters('cookieHmacSecretName')), createObject('name', 'RAC_SHIM_KV_URI', 'value', parameters('kvUri')), createObject('name', 'RAC_SHIM_PARENT_DOMAIN', 'value', parameters('parentDomain')), createObject('name', 'RAC_SHIM_ISSUER', 'value', parameters('issuer')), createObject('name', 'RAC_SHIM_COOKIE_DOMAIN', 'value', parameters('cookieDomain')), createObject('name', 'RAC_SHIM_ACA_INTERNAL_SUFFIX', 'value', parameters('acaInternalSuffix')), createObject('name', 'RAC_SHIM_INSTITUTION_NAME', 'value', parameters('institutionName')), createObject('name', 'RAC_SHIM_BRAND_LOGO_URL', 'value', parameters('brandLogoUrl')), createObject('name', 'RAC_SHIM_ENV', 'value', parameters('racEnv')), createObject('name', 'RAC_SHIM_METRICS_ENABLED', 'value', string(parameters('metricsEnabled')))), if(empty(parameters('otlpEndpoint')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'RAC_SHIM_OTLP_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('otlpEndpoint')))))]

metadata.description: Resource ID of the shim Container App
Internal FQDN of the shim (used as App Gateway backend target)
